description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a robust, angular chassis with heavy-duty armor plating and a low, aggressive stance. It is equipped with four large, rugged wheels, each mounted on articulated suspension arms for maximum ground contact and shock absorption. The front end is reinforced and sports a pair of prominent headlights, while the rear houses a compact, elevated turret or sensor module. Visible mechanical components, such as springs and linkages, suggest advanced off-road capability. The vehicle's exterior is predominantly matte gray, with subtle red and black accents on the wheel hubs and side modules. Its design implies a focus on durability, maneuverability, and occupant protection in challenging urban or off-road environments.
description: A heavily armored, matte gray all-terrain vehicle with four large rugged wheels, articulated suspension, and reinforced front and rear modules. Red and black accents highlight its advanced, durable design for urban and off-road use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated armored body, articulated suspension, and detailed wheel assemblies with visible red and black accents.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the reinforced nose, dual headlights, and wide wheelbase for stability.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the rear turret or sensor module and the symmetrical suspension system.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the compact turret, rear armor, and the robust, wide-set wheels.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires feature a blocky, all-terrain tread pattern with deep grooves and pronounced lugs, designed for optimal traction on both urban surfaces and rough off-road terrain.
